name: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc.
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc., founded in 2011, develops the AI-native Falcon cybersecurity platform, an AI Security Cloud that protects endpoints, cloud workloads, identities, and AI systems. The platform offers 33 cloud modules via SaaS subscription covering endpoint security, managed security services, identity protection, next-generation SIEM, threat intelligence, data protection, SOAR, and AI-driven workflow automation, serving customers through a single lightweight sensor and proprietary graph technologies.
